tools.name: register_contract
tools.description: Add or update an ICT third-party contract. Tracks all DORA Art. 30 mandatory clauses.

tools.name: clause_check
tools.description: Validate a contract against all DORA Art. 30 mandatory clauses (standard + CIF).

tools.name: subcontracting_chain
tools.description: Map and assess the subcontracting chain of a contract (RTS on subcontracting).

tools.name: exit_readiness
tools.description: Evaluate exit plan readiness for a contract — Art. 28(8) exit strategies.

tools.name: cif_analysis
tools.description: Analyze all Critical/Important Function contracts for enhanced Art. 30(3) requirements.

tools.name: contract_gaps
tools.description: Identify missing mandatory clauses across all contracts.

tools.name: contract_scoring
tools.description: Red-flag risk scoring: exit risk, lock-in, jurisdiction, subcontracting gaps.

tools.name: contract_expiry
tools.description: Upcoming contract expirations and renewal deadlines.

tools.name: contract_analyze_llm
tools.description: AI-powered deep analysis of contract text against DORA Art. 30(2) mandatory clauses using local Gemma 4 LLM. Provide raw contract text or a contract_id for structured analysis.
